content.en:
After obtaining the two Hegemony Ultimate Ancestral Techniques, Ye Tian began to work hard to fuse these two Hegemony Ultimate Ancestral Techniques.

In fact, the essence of the two Ultimate Ancestral Techniques was the same, but they fit into different rules of heaven and earth.

One is subordinate to the rules of the Dark Forbidden Realm, and one is subordinate to the rules of the Sanctuary Heaven and Earth.

Therefore, it is not so easy to fuse these two ultimate ancestral techniques.

As the years slowly passed, Ye Tian gradually comprehended the mystery of fusion.

First of all, to fuse these two ultimate ancestral techniques, you must fit yourself, and then fuse these two ultimate ancestral techniques according to yourself.

For example, even if he fused these two Ultimate Ancestral Techniques and turned into the Supreme Ancestral Technique, and the Copying Body Heyuan Holy Beast obtained the memory of the Supreme Ancestral Technique, he would not be able to use it, unless the copying body also fused two Ultimate Sacred Techniques that fit him according to his own body, only then would he have any hope of breaking the shackles and comprehending a Supreme Sacred Technique.

The Replicating Body Heyuan Holy Beast is not even a Supreme Holy Beast at the moment, so naturally there is no way to comprehend a Supreme Holy Technique.

However, Ye Tian now also wanted to help the Replicating Body Heyuan Holy Beast break the shackles and be promoted to the strongest Holy Beast.

Of course, he had to help the replica body break through after the main body stepped into the second level of the Supreme Ancestor.

In fact, he didn't need to waste time doing such a thing, after all, the body had reached the Supreme Ancestor realm, and it could completely replicate the body of the Supreme Holy Beast.

But Ye Tian felt that once the replicating body self-breakthrough reached the strongest holy beast, maybe it would be the same as the original breakthrough of the original Aoba ancestor, and the replicating body would be permanently fixed and turned into a clone, not occupying the quota of the replicating body.

In this way, he would be equivalent to permanently having a clone of the strongest holy beast level.

It's an attempt, and if it does fail, it's just a waste of time.

Realm epoch after realm epoch has passed.

Unconsciously, nearly a hundred realm epochs had passed, and a dark time had almost passed, and at this time, the catastrophe of the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth was coming.

this day.

Ye Tian was finally about to comprehend a supreme ancestral technique.

"It's so difficult, I didn't expect to fuse the two Ultimate Ancestral Techniques, the difficulty is even more difficult than breaking through the Supreme Ancestor, I thought that with the realm of my Supreme Ancestor, it wouldn't take too long to fuse the two Ultimate Ancestral Techniques, but I didn't expect it to take almost a dark time. "

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Eventually, though, he got it.

Bang!!!!

The two Hegemony Ultimate Ancestral Techniques were fused and turned into a Hegemony Supreme Ancestral Technique.

At the moment when the Hegemony Supreme Ancestral Technique was successfully comprehended, a terrifying power emerged from within Ye Tian's body.

At this time, Ye Tian's body strength continued to skyrocket, comparable to the transformation from the top ancestor to the strongest ancestor.

The transformation of power caused Ye Tian's body to continuously absorb the energy of the outside world, but these energies were still not enough.

Therefore, Ye Tian used all the energy collected during this time to complete the transformation of his strength.

It took a few realm years for this transformation to be completely completed.

"I didn't expect that comprehending a supreme ancestral technique would actually cause a transformation of strength, and my current strength has skyrocketed too much!"

Ye Tian clenched his fists, the void was shattering, and he couldn't help but be surprised.

At this time, he finally understood why the Supreme Ancestor was divided into three levels, and once he comprehended a Supreme Ancestor Technique, it belonged to the second level.

After all, once one comprehends a supreme ancestral technique, no matter what kind of supreme ancestral technique, his strength will skyrocket to a terrifying level.

"My strength has skyrocketed, and if I use the Hegemony Supreme Ancestor Technique again, the attack power will be too much higher than before, even if it is an ordinary Supreme Ancestor or Supreme Holy Beast, it will be seriously injured by my blow!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

At this time, there were still a few realm era days left before the Sanctuary Heaven and Earth.

At this time, the major forces of the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth were all preparing for this catastrophe.

After Ye Tian stabilized his realm, he began to create a holy method based on the body of the copied body of the Heyuan Holy Beast.

Ye Tian's copy body Heyuan Holy Beast was promoted to a Holy Beast with the holy method of the six-armed vajra technique, and this holy method was also dedicated to the Haitian Holy Sect.

Later, Ye Tian found this holy law in the treasure house of the Holy Law of the Haitian Holy Sect, otherwise, there would really be no way to attack the Supreme Holy Beast.

Now that you have the holy law that copies your body, you can create a holy law that fits the rules of the Dark Forbidden Realm.

Ye Tian's ontological realm was too high, and he had stepped into the second level of the Supreme Ancestor, so it was not very difficult to create a holy law that fit the Dark Forbidden Domain, the Six-Armed Vajra Technique.

It only took a dozen realm years for Ye Tian to successfully create a holy method that fits the Dark Forbidden Domain, the Six-Armed Vajra Technique.

Soon after.

The Replicating Body Heyuan Holy Beast came to the Haitian Forbidden Land, instantly shared its memories with the main body, obtained this six-armed vajra technique, and then returned to the Haitian Holy Sect.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian's copied body, the Heyuan Holy Beast, began to come from the Six-Armed Vajra Technique of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and used this Holy Technique to attack the Holy Beast of the Second Path.

Soon, the second path also stepped into the holy beast level.

And the countless resources that Ye Tian had collected from the Dark Forbidden Domain had already been sent to the hands of the Replica Body, and now the Replica Body used these resources to quickly cultivate, and the second path made rapid progress, stepping into the top Holy Beast level, and then quickly advancing to the extreme of the Top Holy Beast.

Both Dao have stepped into the extreme of the top holy beast, which means that Ye Tian's copy body can impact the level of the strongest holy beast.

Originally, it would take at least dozens of realm epochs to fuse the two holy laws, but these two holy laws were far inferior to the Endless Ancestor Method, so the difficulty of fusing them was not high.

In addition, Ye Tian's current realm is very high, he is the strongest ancestor of the second level, although the realm of the copy body is still at the top holy beast level, he has the memory of the body, so in terms of knowledge and perception, he is far superior to the top holy beast.

Therefore, Ye Tian felt that he had the hope of completely raising this copy body to the level of the Supreme Holy Beast in the next few realm eras, that is, before the day when the Great Tribulation arrived.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian went all out to comprehend and strive to fuse the two holy laws.

Realm years have passed, and before you know it, a realm era has passed.

At this time, Ye Tian felt that his comprehension was almost complete, and perhaps if he still cultivated a realm era, he would be sure to completely fuse the two holy laws.

Finally, another era of the realm has passed.

On this day, Ye Tian completely fused the two holy methods, and the bodies of the two holy beasts also began to merge, transforming towards the body of the strongest holy beast.

Haitian Holy Sect.

The eyes of the two Supreme Sacred Beasts looked through the infinite space in unison to the retreat place of the Heyuan Holy Beast.

"What's going on, the Heyuan Holy Beast is breaking through and is about to step into the Supreme Holy Beast level?"

The two Supreme Sacred Beasts were stunned.
